notes: Beta build 2026.07.22-394 — 🎯 targets and 🛑 stops now snap to valid ASX ticks too (0.1¢ under 10¢ · 0.5¢ from 10¢–$2 · 1¢ above $2), whether set by % or exact price, on a holding or the buy ticket, and for the auto-pilot's entries. The buy ticket preview shows the snapped price live. Practice money only. Feedback via the ✉ link, top-left.
